# Contributing to Sp3arParvus

First off, thank you for considering contributing to Sp3arParvus! It's people like you who make this project better for everyone.

## Code of Conduct

Help us keep this project open and inclusive by being respectful and helpful to others.

## How Can I Contribute?

### Reporting Bugs
- Use the [**Bug Report**](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md) template when opening an issue.
- Describe the steps to reproduce the issue.
- Mention which game you were playing and what executor you were using.
- Join our [**Discord Server**](https://discord.gg/KJuxMnBFqB) to discuss bugs in real-time before filing an issue.

### Suggesting Enhancements
- Use the [**Feature Request**](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md) template.
- Explain why the feature would be useful to other Roblox developers or QA testers.
- For discussion before filing, post in the `#suggestions` channel on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/KJuxMnBFqB).

### Pull Requests
- Fork the repository.
- Create a new branch for your feature or bug fix.
- Submit a PR with a clear description of the changes.
- PRs to the landing page (`/.pages/`) are also welcome! If you improve the website, include a screenshot.

## Development

The core script is written in Roblox Lua (`Sp3arParvus.lua`). To test changes:
1. Copy the modified script content into your Roblox executor.
2. Run it in a game where you have permission to test.
3. Use `SAFE_MODE = true` at the top of the script to disable high-risk features during testing.

Feel free to reach out on [Discord](https://discord.gg/KJuxMnBFqB) if you have questions about the codebase!
